name: afo-mobile-terminal-mcp
description: Command-center layer above AFO MCP tools. Orchestrates deploy, smoke test, registry, handoff, and Cloudflare inventory.

cards.label: Deploy Worker
cards.description: Preview-first deploy from GitHub to Cloudflare. Requires confirmed:true to execute.

cards.label: Smoke Test Worker
cards.description: Run smoke tests against a live Worker.

cards.label: Register Worker
cards.description: Register or update Worker metadata. Requires confirmed:true to write.

cards.label: Open Tool URLs
cards.description: Return all live URLs for a given worker.

cards.label: Write Handoff
cards.description: Write a handoff note to handoff-mcp or GitHub. Requires confirmed:true to write.
